candidates.why: Only available candidate for revenue-related item; treated as the top-line proxy per candidate list constraint.

variables.notes: Bank income structure is atypical; using the provided balancing item as mandated by candidate list.
No COGS/cost of sales candidates provided; for a bank, such a line often does not exist separately.

candidates.why: Operating income line, but this is income not overhead expense, so excluded from SG&A per instructions.
Classic overhead/operating expense bucket; fits SG&A definition and is not a total/subtotal.
Explicit administrative overhead; a core SG&A component.
Additional operating overhead bucket; treated as SG&A component.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Other operating income' because SG&A should include expenses only, not income. Selected all distinct overhead expense buckets as SG&A components.

candidates.why: Represents capitalized R&D asset on the balance sheet, not the period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research and development - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Represents accumulated amortization/impairment of R&D assets, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Only R&D-related candidates are balance sheet asset/amortization lines; no explicit R&D expense line exists in the provided candidates, so XRD is set to 0.

candidates.why: Component of gross interest income, not net or total interest expense.
Component of interest income on securities, not interest expense.
Appears to be aggregate customer interest income; sign and context indicate income, not expense.
Appears to be bond-related interest income; not the main expense line.
Likely interest income on bank balances; not the primary interest expense line.
Other interest/dividend income; not the main interest expense.
Breakdown of interest vs. institutes; context unclear but not needed if a clear total expense line exists.
Explicit total interest expense line (large negative values); best match for XINT per definition.
Component of interest expense but a subset; prefer the aggregate 'Interest expense' line.
Specific interest expense component; subset of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; narrower than total interest expense.
Equity income, not interest expense.
Explicitly non-interest; should not be used for XINT.
Earnings attribution, not interest.
Earnings attribution, not interest.
Label suggests interest payable, but no numeric preview; not needed since a clear 'Interest expense' total exists.
Likely interest related to credit institutions; subset of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; subset of total interest expense.
Balance sheet accrued interest asset; not P&L expense.
Generic accrued interest on liabilities/deposits; balance sheet item, not the P&L flow.
Generic accrued interest; balance sheet, not income statement expense line.
Equity ownership, not interest cost.
Equity minority interest, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit aggregate interest expense line rather than individual components or balance sheet accruals.

candidates.why: Income statement fair value gains/losses, not equity balance.
Descriptor of instruments at fair value, not total book equity.
Equity-accounted profits, not the equity balance itself.
Component of equity, but not total book equity; prefer the total line.
Minority equity, not total equity attributable to all owners.
Likely alternate or detailed equity line; less clear than explicit total equity lines.
Explicit total equity line; best representation of book equity.
Duplicate total equity label with different casing; either would work but one is sufficient.

variables.notes: Used the explicit 'Total Equity' balance sheet line as book equity; duplicate lowercase variant not additionally selected.

candidates.why: Income from associates/JVs, not minority interest in consolidated subsidiaries.
Income statement attribution of profit to minorities; could be used, but equity-based line is generally preferred for MIB stock.
Duplicate of minority profit attribution; similar to previous line.
Explicit non-controlling interests in equity; best match for minority interest balance (MIB).
Balance sheet minority interest; numeric preview shows 0.0 and appears redundant with 'Equity Non-Controlling Interests'.
Abbreviated minority interest; likely same as previous, but 'Equity Non-Controlling Interests' is clearer.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit equity non-controlling interests line as the minority interest balance.
